name: LM Studio
description: Local inference server — OpenAI-compatible API on localhost. Runs MLX/GGUF models on Apple Silicon and other GPUs.

name: LM Link
description: Remote LM Studio access via Tailscale HTTPS. Lets the harness reach an LM Studio instance hosted on another machine.

name: Claude Code
description: MCP tool provider — exposes Stallari vault, graph, and lens tools to the Claude Code CLI.

name: Claude Desktop
description: Interactive Claude runtime for manual sessions. Stallari registers as an MCP server inside Claude Desktop.

name: ntfy server
description: Self-hosted ntfy push server for harness notifications. Family-org tenancy uses a Stallari-hosted instance; personal users may point at any ntfy endpoint.

name: Stallari GPU worker
description: Cross-platform GPU compute worker (Plane 11). Runs on Linux, NixOS, Windows, or OCI; the harness routes inference jobs to it over the fleet mesh.

name: MLX add-on services
description: Background MLX-Swift services that load and serve quantised models on-device. Bundled with the harness; appears as an add-on so users can see runtime status.
